scope: B9.1A prospective-pilot PRE-ANALYSIS protocol (pre-registered). Development-only, NO scientific/biological claim, NOT validation, NO tag. Frozen BEFORE any acquisition/analysis.
estimand: under the pre-randomized, class-balanced, within-microblock audit contract, detect a condition-specific C x Z interaction in decoding the PRE-ASSIGNED cue Y_design, beyond known randomization variation. Natural prior shift / non-randomized condition / covariate confound -> REFUSE (CONTRACT_INVALID_OR_OUT_OF_ESTIMAND).
decision_engine: B9.0 state machine (csc/b9/), UNCHANGED. Contract-first, Z/T-blind validator; exact null resamples C* only within (subject, microblock, Y_design); byte-reused B3 contrast; alert = contract-valid AND estimable AND p_meanT<=0.025 AND p_stud<=0.025 AND n_eligible>=20.
pilot_table: b9_stage1_assignment_table.csv (hash-pinned in .sha256; manifest attests generated_before_recording + Y_design_pre_assignment). Executed acquisition adheres row-for-row on trial_id; full-tuple (C,Y_design,subject,microblock) mismatch -> CONTRACT_INVALID_OR_OUT_OF_ESTIMAND.

exclusions_predeclared.artifact_rejection: predeclared automated pipeline (e.g. amplitude/variance thresholds), applied BEFORE unblinding to C outcomes; the specific rule is fixed in the acquisition protocol, not chosen after seeing results
exclusions_predeclared.min_valid_trials_per_cell: >= (a predeclared minimum) valid trials per subject x microblock x C x Y_design after rejection
exclusions_predeclared.rejected_trials_semantics: if rejection/attrition induces C x Y_design imbalance or a prior shift P(Y_design|C) beyond tolerance -> the CONTRACT is BROKEN (CONTRACT_INVALID_OR_OUT_OF_ESTIMAND); if it merely lowers counts while balance holds -> INSUFFICIENT_LABELS_OR_SUPPORT. Rejection is NEVER used to post-hoc rebalance after seeing outcomes.

A_contract_valid_null_audit.status: PENDING_ACQUISITION (governance-gated; NOT run in B9.0/B9.1A pre-acquisition)
A_contract_valid_null_audit.input: the real acquired pilot data under the pinned assignment table
A_contract_valid_null_audit.purpose: main pilot safety check -- under a real contract-valid randomization, is there no obvious false alert?

B_forced_violation.status: RUN (on the pilot's actual table + SYNTHETIC Z; machinery check, NOT biology)
B_forced_violation.input: deliberately corrupted COPIES of the manifest/table (never the real raw data): flipped C, shuffled Y_design, missing table, condition-lock, microblock imbalance, corrupt pinned hash, post-hoc manifest
B_forced_violation.expectation: every case -> CONTRACT_INVALID_OR_OUT_OF_ESTIMAND BEFORE any p-value (ran_test False) -- verifies the B9.0 hardened validator stays hardened in the pilot pipeline

C_semisynthetic_positive.status: RUN as DIAGNOSTIC / power-sizing only (synthetic Z following the locked table; NOT a biological concept claim)
C_semisynthetic_positive.input: boundary signal injected on synthetic Z using the locked assignment table
C_semisynthetic_positive.expectation: the pipeline runs the exact null and, at an alert-capable cohort size, can detect the injected concept; at the pilot size it CANNOT alert (size gate)

size_gate_finding: min_confirm_pairs=20 subjects. Pilot 6-10 subjects < 20 -> the pilot CANNOT emit B9_CONCEPT_ALERT regardless of signal. The 6-10 pilot is contract-feasibility + null-behavior only; alert-level power AND alert-level null-control require >=20 eligible subjects. min_confirm_pairs is UNCHANGED (no gate tuning). Reviewer decision: run the feasibility pilot as-is (alert-level deferred) or scope a >=20-subject cohort.

success_screen_development.contract_execution: >=90% executed trials match the assignment table; no systematic C x Y_design imbalance after predefined exclusions
success_screen_development.support: >=80% subjects have sufficient support; exact-null sampler valid on >=80% analyzable subjects/cohorts
success_screen_development.safety: contract-valid null B9_ALERT near zero (NOTE: size-gate-trivial at pilot n<20); no forced violation produces an alert
success_screen_development.diagnostic_power: optional injected positive > 0 alerts (only assessable at an alert-capable cohort size >=20)

interpretation.mostly_INSUFFICIENT_SUPPORT: NOT a method failure -> acquisition-budget redesign
interpretation.forced_violation_alerts: validator FAILED -> fix before any claim
interpretation.contract_valid_null_alerts_at_n>=20: exact null or acquisition contract still wrong

governance: actual human-EEG collection is gated on the institution's local governance/ethics process BEFORE any recording; NO data collected in B9.0/B9.1A; this is not legal/IRB advice.
